params.name: text
params.description: Visible skip-link label. Defaults to `Skip to main content` if you do not provide a value.

params.name: href
params.description: Target fragment or URL for the link skip. Defaults to `#maincontent` if you do not provide a value.

params.name: classes
params.description: Extra classes applied to the anchor element. Use for layout or integration hooks rather than changing the component pattern.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Additional HTML attributes for the anchor element, for example `data-*` or `aria-*` attributes.
